summary: Mislabeled Springfield Civic Center recording; no audio or performance details provided
review: Both reviewers note that the tape is incorrectly titled as Niagara Falls and actually documents a concert at the Springfield Civic Center in Massachusetts. Beyond correcting the venue, they give no information about sound quality or musical performance, so listeners have little guidance on the recording’s technical merit.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews focused solely on mislabeling; one gave 0 stars, the other 4 stars, providing no insight into sound or show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity, mix, or source type; reviewers only mentioned incorrect venue labeling.
